title: Contract Inspector Studio
prompt:
Create a UI mockup for "NEXUS Contract Inspector Studio". 16:9, dark-mode technical product interface.
Show a workflow graph on the left, a selected node inspector in the middle with fields purpose, rationale, config, inputs, outputs, limits, compiler, artifact policy, and a right panel with canonical workflow JSON and a validator ladder.
Validator ladder rows: Syntax, Schema, Topology, Capability, Security. Use passed/warning/error badges.
Make it look like a serious engineering workflow editor, small radii, precise spacing, no flashy gradients, readable code panel.

Rendering requirements: Generate a crisp browser-app UI concept mockup, landscape composition, no fake browser chrome, no illegible tiny lorem ipsum, make labels readable, align panels carefully, professional product design artifact for a technical architecture report.
